title: SCPN Control: Neuro-Symbolic Stochastic Petri Net Controllers with First-Principles Gyrokinetic Transport for Real-Time Tokamak Plasma Control
description: Standalone neuro-symbolic control engine that compiles Stochastic Petri Nets into spiking neural network controllers with contract-based verification. Features a Grad-Shafranov equilibrium solver (fixed + free boundary, JAX-differentiable), 1.5D Crank-Nicolson transport, five-tier gyrokinetic transport (critical-gradient baseline, QLKNN surrogate, native linear eigenvalue solver, native TGLF-equivalent model, nonlinear delta-f solver), five external GK code interfaces, hybrid surrogate+GK validation with OOD detection and online learning, ballooning eigenvalue solver, sawtooth Kadomtsev crash model, NTM dynamics, current diffusion/drive, SOL two-point model, H-infinity/mu-synthesis/NMPC/gain-scheduled/sliding-mode/fault-tolerant controllers, safe RL, scenario scheduling, real-time EFIT, shape control, integrated scenario simulator, adaptive Kuramoto coupling with GK-driven K_nm bridge, Lyapunov guard, and WebSocket streaming. The v0.20.0 public validation posture treats quantitative nonlinear Cyclone Base Case heat-flux agreement as an open revalidation target. 134 Python modules, 5 Rust crates, 3,700+ collected Python tests, 20 CI jobs.
notes: Part of the SCPN (Self-Consistent Phenomenological Network) research framework by ANULUM. v0.16.0: 20 new physics/control modules — gyrokinetic transport, ballooning eigenvalue solver, sawtooth Kadomtsev model, NTM dynamics, current diffusion/drive, SOL model, integrated scenario simulator, NMPC, mu-synthesis, gain-scheduled/sliding-mode/fault-tolerant/shape controllers, real-time EFIT, scenario scheduler, safe RL, RZIp model, RWM feedback, control benchmark suite. v0.14.0: PPO 500K cloud training beats MPC (143.7 vs 58.1). v0.13.0: JAX-differentiable GS solver.
